keyset.title: Keyset
keyset.subtitle: Profiles, conflict cleanup, and safe remaps
keyset.search.placeholder: Search action, key, category, or id
keyset.profile.name: Profile Name
keyset.profile.deck_body: Profiles save full control layouts so you can switch jobs without rebuilding your keys.
keyset.resolve.no_preview: No safe fix preview is ready.
keyset.help.steps: 1. Pick a profile. 2. Search or click a conflict. 3. Fix one binding or preview a safe cleanup.
keyset.help.step1: Pick a profile or save your live keys into a new one.
keyset.help.step2: Search by action, key, category, or id to cut through noisy modpacks.
keyset.help.step3: Fix one bind directly or preview a safe cleanup before applying it.
keyset.help.active_profile: Manual edits and Safe Fix only work on the active profile.
keyset.help.group_headers: Tip: click a group header to jump straight to the first conflicting bind in that section.
keyset.selection.preview_body: You are looking at the proposed cleanup plan instead of the live conflict list.
keyset.selection.none_body: Pick a conflict from the list to unlock the direct controls.
keyset.empty.conflicts_body: Try another search, change grouping, or switch profiles.
keyset.empty.preview_body: Keyset could not find a safer remap for the visible conflicts.
keyset.resolve.card.ready_body: Preview Safe Fix to test a cleanup plan before Keyset changes the live profile.
keyset.resolve.card.preview_body: Review the suggested remaps, then apply them or undo the last pass.
keyset.resolve.card.inactive_body: Apply %s first. Manual edits and Safe Fix always work against the active profile.
keyset.resolve.card.empty_body: This profile looks clean. Try another profile if you expected conflicts.
keyset.footer.default: Pick a profile, then choose a conflict or preview Safe Fix.
keyset.footer.pick_conflict: Select a conflict to unlock manual fixes.
keyset.footer.preview: Preview mode: review the plan or apply it.
keyset.tip.search: Filter conflicts by action name, category, key label, or internal id.
keyset.tip.group: Switch between grouping conflicts by assigned key or by category.
keyset.tip.profile_name: Rename uses this field, and New From Live uses it as the starting name.
keyset.tip.profile_apply: Make the selected profile live immediately and write those bindings into Minecraft controls.
keyset.tip.profile_capture: Copy the current live controls into the selected profile and mark those edits as sticky user choices.
keyset.tip.profile_rename: Rename the selected profile without changing its internal id.
keyset.tip.profile_new: Create a new profile from the current live controls.
keyset.tip.profile_duplicate: Create a copy of the selected profile.
keyset.tip.profile_delete: Delete the selected profile. If it is active, Keyset falls back to Default.
keyset.tip.export: Copy the selected profile as JSON to the clipboard.
keyset.tip.import: Import profile JSON from the clipboard. Name collisions are renamed safely.
keyset.tip.resolve_preview: Generate a safe cleanup preview for the active profile only.
keyset.tip.resolve_preview_empty: There are no visible conflicts for this profile, so there is nothing to preview.
keyset.tip.resolve_apply: Apply the current Safe Fix preview to the active profile.
keyset.tip.resolve_apply_pending: Generate a Safe Fix preview first.
keyset.tip.resolve_undo: Restore the bindings from before the last applied Safe Fix pass.
keyset.tip.resolve_undo_unavailable: Apply a Safe Fix before undo becomes available.
keyset.tip.binding_jump: Open the vanilla Controls list focused on this binding.
keyset.tip.binding_clear: Clear the selected binding in the active profile and save it immediately.
keyset.tip.binding_reassign: Open the vanilla Controls list and arm this binding for immediate reassignment.
keyset.tip.binding_preview_mode: Leave preview mode before using direct binding actions.
keyset.tip.actions_require_active: This action only works while the selected profile is also the active profile.
keyset.status.profile_created: Created a new profile from current bindings.
keyset.status.profile_captured: Saved the current live bindings into the selected profile.
keyset.status.exported: Copied the selected profile JSON to the clipboard.
keyset.status.resolve_preview: Generated a Safe Fix preview for the active profile.
keyset.status.resolve_none: No safe cleanup changes were found.
keyset.status.resolve_applied: Applied the Safe Fix preview to the active profile.
keyset.status.binding_cleared: Cleared the selected binding and saved it to the active profile.
keyset.error.import_empty: Clipboard JSON did not contain any profiles.
keyset.error.no_preview: Generate a Safe Fix preview before applying it.
keyset.error.no_undo: There is no Safe Fix change to undo.
keyset.error.actions_require_active: This action only works while the selected profile is also the active profile.
keyset.keybinds.jump_helper: Vanilla Controls opened for the selected conflict.
keyset.keybinds.reassign_helper: Press a new key now to reassign the selected conflict.
